name: The Monday Night War: WWE vs. WCW
original_name: The Monday Night War: WWE vs. WCW
overview: A documentary about the period in sports entertainment, known as the Monday Night Wars. Includes interviews with past and present on-air personalities. Also includes looking back on superstars and storylines that made the Monday Night Wars so memorable.

trailers.title: Sneak Peek: The Monday Night War - WWE vs. WCW
